description: Creates a table with user-provided asciimath values displayed as-is
utility: Display explicit data values in table format with optional headers and styling

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Starting position of table in logical coordinates

arguments.name: columns
arguments.description: One or more data() expressions providing column values as asciimath strings

arguments.name: headers
arguments.description: Optional header() expression providing column labels

arguments.name: layout
arguments.description: Table orientation: horizontal (columns as rows) or vertical (default)

alternates.description: Create table with two columns of values

alternates.syntax: datatable(at(row, col), data("1", "2"), data("4", "5"), header("x", "x^2"), c(blue), fc(yellow))
alternates.description: Table with headers and custom colors

examples.scenario: Datatable comparing standard ellipse formula with solved values
examples.expression: mathexpr_1=datatable(at(2,2),data("(x^(2))/(b^(2))+(y^(2))/(a^(2))=1","(x^(2))/(4)+(y^(2))/(25)=1"),data("text(y axis )","text(y axis )"),data("c^(2)=a^(2)-b^(2)","c^2 = 21"),data("(0,+-c)","(0,+-sqrt(21))"),data("2b","4"),data("2a","10"),data("e=(c)/(a)","e=(sqrt(21))/(5)"),data("(2b^(2))/(a)","(8)/(5)"),data("(0,+-a)","(0,+-5)"),header("text(   Equation )","text(major axis)","text(         )c^2text(         )","text(foci)","text(length of )-text(minor axis)","text(length of)-text( major axis)","text(eccentricity)","text(LLR)","text(Vertices)"),c(black),notes("Compare standard formula with solved values"))
